headlines: Cyber offenses now account for around a third of all crime across Asia and South Pacific
Estonia intends to recognize AI agents with digital IDs
Git good with Epic Games' new open source VCS, Lore

crew_quote: "You know, with all these cyber crimes, maybe I should start taking my curry recipes digital—after all, who wouldn't want to hack into a good vindaloo?"
